entries.description: Started Session 1 via `python -m ai_router.start_session --session-set-dir docs/session-sets/025-router-config-editor-spec --engine claude-code --provider anthropic --model claude-opus-4-7 --effort medium`. State file flipped currentSession null -> 1, status not-started -> in-progress, lifecycleState null -> work_in_progress; work_started event appended to session-events.jsonl.

Authored docs/session-sets/025-router-config-editor-spec/spec.md (~280 lines) capturing the eight gating decisions (G1-G8) from the cross-provider design audit at docs/proposals/2026-05-15-router-config-editor-design-audit/, with a five-session Set 026 implementation plan (outsourceMode clean-sweep / schema migration + resolver / webview / significance flagging / release).

Authored docs/session-sets/025-router-config-editor-spec/schema-examples.md showing current vs proposed YAML side-by-side for router-config.yaml providers: block (adds display_label + enabled), budget.yaml (renames threshold_scope -> scope, adds warn_at_percent), new ai_router/local-overrides.yaml, plus .gitignore + package.json deltas.

Authored docs/session-sets/025-router-config-editor-spec/wireframes.md with ASCII layouts for six webview sections (routing/verification, budget, providers table, significance flagging, notifications, local-overrides summary), plus a cross-cutting validation surface section.

Cross-provider verification round 1 via ai_router.query(model='gpt-5-4', task_type='session-verification'). Prompt: 8 verification questions + spec.md + schema-examples.md + wireframes.md + audit-summary.md as Appendix A (69,482 chars). Verdict: 'Almost, but not yet' -- 5 minimum fixes named before Set 026 can start cold-buildable. Issues: G2 provider_id drift in spec.md Session 2 title + Section 3 row spec; G7 per-session inconsistency; G4 routing dropdown persistence target undefined; verification dropdown enum mapping not spelled out; local-overrides 'strict subset' wording too strong; atomic-save claim across multiple files overstated; Session 3 deliverables list excluded two wireframed sections; test-notification button not in any session plan. Cost: $0.1846 (15,626 input tokens, 9,704 output tokens).

Applied all 5 minimum fixes + 2 Q7 refinements in-session: (Fix 1) removed provider_id/api_base_url/api_key_env_var drift from spec.md Session 2 title + Section 3 providers row spec; (Fix 2) added new schema-examples.md File 1b defining routing.outsourcing_mode in router-config.yaml as the canonical persistence target for the routing dropdown (enum: whenever-helpful / verification-only / disabled), updated wireframes Section 1 'YAML writes' to point at it; (Fix 3) made G7 per-session-removed-from-UI consistent across spec.md G7 row + Session 2 schema changes + schema-examples File 2 + wireframes Section 2 Budget scope dropdown; (Fix 4) defined local-overrides precedence + unknown-key behavior in new spec.md Appendix B (5-point precedence rules block), rewrote schema-examples File 3 to call out the strict allowlist, removed stray extension.pythonPath example; (Fix 5) softened multi-file atomic-save claim in wireframes Validation section (per-file atomic + best-effort recovery for half-written batches), added new spec.md Appendix B as the single normative source for every webview control's persistence target (12-row control-to-YAML mapping table + verification dropdown enum mapping + 5 precedence rules + threshold_scope -> scope migration rule + write atomicity clarification + validation timing). (R1) Session 3 deliverables list expanded to six sections matching six wireframed sections. (R2) Wizard integration + test-notification button wiring moved from Session 3 to Session 5; wireframes Section 5 notes the button is wired in Session 5. Round-2 reroute skipped following Set 023 Session 4 precedent (doc-only drift, no architectural change, fixes verifiable by reading the diff).
